company_name: H2O So Clean Pool & Spa Services

hero.headline:
Your Pool Deserves a Certified
Expert
hero.subheadline: Stop guessing with your water chemistry and equipment. Daniel Schreiber, CPO-certified owner of H2O So Clean, personally services every pool with a 13-factor water test and 45-point equipment inspection. San Diego trusts us for a reason.

services.label: Our Services
services.headline: Complete Pool, Spa & Fountain<br class="hidden md:block">Care for San Diego
services.subtitle: From weekly maintenance to emergency green-to-clean rescues, H2O So Clean handles it all. Certified, licensed, and owner-operated -- so every visit meets the highest standard.

cards.title: Weekly Pool Maintenance
cards.description: Skimming, brushing, vacuuming, and a 13-factor water chemistry test every visit. Your pool stays swim-ready without you lifting a finger.

cards.title: Pool & Spa Repairs
cards.description: Pumps, filters, heaters, automation panels, lights, and plumbing leaks -- diagnosed honestly and repaired at competitive prices. No upselling, ever.

cards.title: Green-to-Clean Recovery
cards.description: Algae-filled nightmare? We restore neglected green pools to crystal-clear condition through deep cleaning, chemical treatment, and filtration optimization.

cards.title: Spa Service & Maintenance
cards.description: Expert hot tub cleaning, chemical balancing, and routine maintenance so your spa stays hygienic, properly heated, and ready to enjoy anytime.

cards.title: Equipment Installations
cards.description: Variable speed pumps, automation systems, LED lighting, and energy-efficient upgrades installed by a licensed contractor for lasting performance.

cards.title: Fountain Maintenance
cards.description: Complete fountain cleaning, repair, and upkeep to keep your decorative water features running beautifully and efficiently year-round.

how_it_works.headline: Three Steps to a Worry-Free Pool

steps.title: Book Your Free Consultation
steps.description: Schedule your complimentary visit. Daniel personally performs a full service, 13-factor water test, and 45-point equipment inspection -- a $220 value, completely free.

steps.title: Get an Honest Assessment
steps.description: No pushy sales pitch. You receive a clear report on your pool's condition, cost-saving recommendations, and a fair quote for any services you need.

steps.title: Enjoy Crystal-Clear Water
steps.description: Sit back while your CPO-certified technician keeps your pool pristine week after week. If anything is ever off, we make it right at no extra charge.

about.label: Why San Diego Pool Owners Trust Us
about.headline: Owner-Operated. Certified. No Shortcuts.
about.description: H2O So Clean is led by Daniel Schreiber, a Certified Pool Operator and licensed contractor who personally handles every job. Since 2018, we have served pools, spas, and fountains across San Diego County with an honest, no-upsell approach. Our customers consistently rate us 5 stars because we treat every pool like our own -- providing thorough work, transparent pricing, and recommendations that save you money.

features.title: Licensed & Certified Professional
features.description: Daniel holds both a Certified Pool Operator credential (#623805) and a California Contractor's License (#1067459) for your peace of mind.

features.title: No Contracts. No Upselling.
features.description: We earn your business every visit. No long-term commitments, no pressure to buy equipment you don't need. Just honest, quality service.

features.title: Free $220 Consultation
features.description: Every new client gets a complimentary full service, 13-factor water chemistry analysis, and 45-point equipment inspection before committing to anything.

pricing.headline: Fair Pricing. No Hidden Fees.
pricing.subtitle: Every plan includes our 13-factor water test and 45-point equipment check. No contracts -- upgrade, downgrade, or cancel anytime.

guarantee.headline: Our "Crystal-Clear" Guarantee
guarantee.description: If you are not 100% satisfied with any service visit, we come back and redo it at no charge -- no questions asked. Daniel personally oversees every job, so your pool always meets the highest standard. We do not consider a job done until you are completely happy with the result.

faqs.question: What is included in the free consultation?
faqs.answer: Your complimentary consultation includes a full pool service, 13-factor water chemistry analysis, 45-point equipment inspection, and system efficiency evaluation -- a $220 value at no cost. Daniel personally performs every consultation so you get expert-level insight from day one.

faqs.question: Do I need to be home during service?
faqs.answer: Not at all. Most clients provide gate access and we handle everything while you are away. After each visit, you receive a detailed service summary so you always know exactly what was done and how your pool is performing.

faqs.question: Do you require long-term contracts?
faqs.answer: Never. We believe in earning your business every single visit. No contracts, no cancellation fees, no penalties. You stay because you love the service, not because you are locked in.

faqs.question: How quickly can you start service?
faqs.answer: Most new clients are scheduled within the same week. For green pool emergencies, we offer rapid response. Call us at 858-732-5426 and we will work with your schedule.

faqs.question: What areas do you serve in San Diego?
faqs.answer: We serve all of San Diego County including Carmel Valley, La Jolla, Del Mar, Rancho Santa Fe, Encinitas, Solana Beach, Poway, Scripps Ranch, and surrounding communities. If you are in San Diego County, we can help.

testimonials.name: Jessie B.
testimonials.text: Daniel at H2O So Clean far exceeded our expectations and impressed us with his knowledge and customer service. We interacted with 4 different pool companies with limited success. Daniel was responsive, gave detailed explanations, and provided money-saving advice on equipment efficiency.

testimonials.name: Andrew C.
testimonials.text: Daniel was awesome to work with and very responsive. His prices are competitive and he's very knowledgeable about pool equipment and water chemistry. Highly recommend H2O So Clean to anyone in San Diego.

testimonials.name: Eve M.
testimonials.text: Needed a new variable pool pump. Daniel found one immediately even though they were out of stock in most areas and installed it with precision, taking time to explain all about how to set it up. Reasonable pricing and professional service.
